name: Kentucky Blackberry Jam Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak raisins in crushed pineapple for several hours or overnight.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves.
3. Cream shortening and butter or margarine in a large bowl of electric mixer.
4. Gradually add sugar to the mixture and beat until fluffy.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Blend in jam.
7. Alternately add sifted dry ingredients and buttermilk to the creamed mixture.
8. Blend in pineapple, raisins, and pecans.
9. Pour batter into a greased and floured 13x9x2-inch pan.
10. Bake at 350 degrees F for 55 to 60 minutes or until done.
11. Dust with confectioners' sugar; cut into squares.
This will freeze.
